sample-project-phase2/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration and Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
sample-project-phase2/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ and uses Jakarta EE namespaces; staying on 2.6.3 would cause classpath conflicts and missing API errors when combined with Java 21 and other Spring Boot 3 dependencies.

sample-project-phase2/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
sample-project-phase2/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would compile against Java 17 APIs, potentially missing Java 21 features or failing if the build environment enforces Java 21 source levels.

sample-project-phase2/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the deprecated MySQL Connector artifact with the new group ID and artifact ID.
sample-project-phase2/pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact 'mysql:mysql-connector-java' is deprecated and may not be available or compatible with newer dependency resolution chains in Spring Boot 3.x/Java 21 environments; the new artifact 'com.mysql:mysql-connector-j' is the required replacement.

sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Migrate servlet API import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: Class javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments; compilation fails with 'package javax.servlet.http does not exist'.

sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' errors on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace.
sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.servlet.http does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3.x).

sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with modern Spring Security 6 configuration style.
sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7 and removed in Spring Security 6, causing compilation errors or runtime failures in Spring Boot 3.3.

sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Migrate HttpSecurity configuration from fluent API to lambda DSL.
sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: The old fluent API methods like authorizeRequests() and formLogin() without lambdas are deprecated/removed in Spring Security 6, requiring the new lambda-based DSL for compilation.

sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Replace antMatchers with requestMatchers in authorization rules.
sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: antMatchers is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7 and removed in Spring Security 6, requiring requestMatchers for path matching.

sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Update formLogin configuration to use lambda DSL.
sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: The old formLogin() fluent API is deprecated/removed in Spring Security 6, requiring the lambda-based configuration.

sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Update logout configuration to use lambda DSL.
sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: The old logout() fluent API is deprecated/removed in Spring Security 6, requiring the lambda-based configuration.

sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Migrate annotation import from javax.annotation to jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is no longer available in Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+ environments, causing a compile error (cannot find symbol) if the old import is retained.
